section.para: 1. Introduction 2. Versioning 3. Fundamentals of Method Ringing 4. Method Classification 5. Method Naming 6. Performance Reporting 7. Record Lengths 8. Method Extension 9. Related Roles Appendices A. Place Notation B. Method Name Syntax C. Leadhead Codes D. Extension Processes E. False Courseheads F. Framework Principles G. Version 2 Development H. Version 2 Consultation 2. Versioning Version 1 Implemented February 24, 2019 with an effective date of June 1, 2019. Version 2 Implemented Janury 26, 2022 with an effective date of May 1, 2022. Version 2 is the current live version of the Framework. See Appendix G for information on the development of version 2 and the changes that were made. See Appendix H for information on the ringing community consultation that took place prior to the implementation of version 2.
